metadata.description: Custom Claude Code plugins — multi-phase AI development pipeline (essense-flow + autopilot), data exploration, prompt modifiers, project question tracking, and cross-platform alerts.

plugins.name: essense-flow
plugins.description: Multi-phase AI development pipeline. Closed contracts, evidence-bound review, fail-soft hooks, no resource caps. Nine skills (elicit, research, triage, architect, build, review, verify, context, heal) drive a state machine from project pitch to shipped code. Every phase-producing skill writes artifact + transitions state atomically. Every agent self-report is re-validated against disk — drift is auditable, not silent. Hooks are advisory: context-inject surfaces phase + canonical paths on every prompt, next-step suggests the recommended slash command on Stop. Both fail-soft on degraded state — never block tool calls. v0.7.0 archived on archive/essense-flow-v0.7.

plugins.name: essense-autopilot
plugins.description: Stop-hook autopilot for essense-flow pipelines. Drives the pipeline forward across phases without you typing between steps. Halts at human gates (eliciting, verifying), real blockers, in-flight background Agent calls (transcript-scan), forward-detect for sprint-complete + QA-REPORT, and no-progress (same phase + sprint + wave as last fire → suggests /heal). Opt-in per project via .pipeline/config.yaml. Diagnostic stderr on every halt path.

plugins.name: schema-scout
plugins.description: CLI tool for exploring the schema and values of any data file (XLSX, CSV, JSON). Auto-detects JSON in cells, repairs double-encoded UTF-8, prunes overflow artifacts.

plugins.name: thorough-mode
plugins.description: Prompt modifiers — keyword triggers (++, @thorough, @ship, @present) that inject behavioral rules for thoroughness, documentation checks, interactive questions, and more. Smart hints suggest modifiers when you describe the intent without the keyword.

plugins.name: project-note-tracker
plugins.description: Track questions per handler/department. Auto-detects which handler should answer, researches from project context in the background, logs to an Excel tracker, generates meeting agendas. Auto-gitignores itself.

plugins.name: alert-sounds
plugins.description: Cross-platform alerts for Claude Code events — sound, desktop notifications, status line colors, volume control, and mute/unmute. Fully configurable per event.

plugins.name: mk-cc-all
plugins.description: All currently-active mk-cc-resources skills in one install: essense-flow, schema-scout, thorough-mode, project-note-tracker. essense-autopilot and alert-sounds carry hooks and must be installed separately. Benched plugins (miltiaze, ladder-build, architect, safe-commit, project-structure, repo-audit, mk-flow) are preserved on the archive/benched-plugins branch.
